Headline: Westbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted near 75th/Perry
ShortDescription: Westbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, Lafayette, 76th, Vincennes and 75th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, Lafayette, 76th, Vincennes and over the normal route, due to street blockage near 75th/Perry.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
